title: Mature Crunchy French Potatoes Pomme Friture
description: A savory and crunchy French-inspired dish originating from Brittany, featuring air-fried potatoes with a touch of sugar, suitable for a vegan diet.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
Place the potato rounds in a large bowl and sprinkle with flour, vegan sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to coat the potatoes evenly.
Drizzle the rapeseed oil over the potatoes and toss to coat.
Place the potato rounds in the air fryer basket in a single layer, leaving some space between each potato for even cooking.
Cook the potatoes for 12-15 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through.
After cooking, season the potatoes with lemon juice and serve hot.
If desired, garnish with chopped fresh herbs like parsley or chives.
